programmes.show_description: (2010) Action-thriller starring Angelina Jolie. A CIA agent goes on the run after a Russian defector claims that she's a sleeper agent who's about to commit a terrible act of terrorism.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
(1951) Western starring Van Heflin. During the uprising of the Sioux nation, a cunning scout attempts to save the 7th Cavalry after an officer orders the brutal massacre of Sioux innocents.
(1958) Brooding western starring Joan Collins and Gregory Peck. A man hunts down the four escaped prisoners who he believes are responsible for the murder of his wife.
(1958) Western. Van Heflin stars as a veteran frontiersman whose determination to mould his sons in his gun-totin' image backfires disastrously. With Tab Hunter and James Darren.
(1964) Romcom starring Rock Hudson and Doris Day. Thinking he has just a few months to live, a man makes his wife suspect he's having an affair when he tries to find her a new partner.
(1999) Hugh Grant and Julia Roberts star in the BAFTA-winning comedy romance about a bookshop owner who manages to get a glamorous movie star to go out with him. With Rhys Ifans.
(2018) Action crime thriller sequel. Denzel Washington returns as Robert McCall, who's out for revenge after ruthless killers murder an agency contact who he also considered a friend.
(2020) Oscar-winning drama with Anthony Hopkins and Olivia Colman. A man living with dementia struggles to piece reality together as he fights to keep his independence in his beloved home.
(2020) Blake Lively and Jude Law star in Reed Morano's thriller from the producers of 007. A woman seeks vengeance on the people who killed her family.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
(1943) Drama. Director Sam Wood's epic adaptation of Ernest Hemingway's classic story about the Spanish Civil War. Starring Oscar-nominees Gary Cooper and Ingrid Bergman.
Director Michael Pearce and star Jessie Buckley talk about making the dark British drama set on Jersey.
(1949) Drama with John Ireland. A local politician begins to lust for the kind of power he used to hold to account. He should be careful how he treats people on the way to the top...
(1971) Vanessa Redgrave stars in a dramatisation of the life of the 16th-century Scottish queen. Glenda Jackson co-stars as her cousin and rival, England's Queen Elizabeth I.
(1989) Star-studded tragi-comedy with Julia Roberts, Daryl Hannah, Dolly Parton and more. Six Southern belles console and cajole each other through life in a Louisiana beauty parlour.
(2020) Action thriller starring Liam Neeson as a notorious bank robber. He wants to give it all up for love but is cheated by corrupt FBI agents. Can he clear his name and get the girl?
(1984) Oscar-winning real-life drama. American reporter Sydney Schanberg and his translator Dith Pran are separated during the Cambodian Civil War, putting Dith Pran in mortal danger.
